title: Method and system for capturing sequence of images
abstract: A system and a method of capturing a sequence of images are provided. The novel method provides an automatic solution of capturing images of an object in a burst mode. The method receives a camera preview frame and an input identifying at least one object to facilitate image analysis of a camera preview frame to identify at least one object to be captured in the camera preview frame and occurrence of at least one first event. The method thereafter automatically triggers, capturing of a sequence of images based on the image analysis and occurrence of the at least one first event. Further the method captures a sequence of images. The method dynamically and continuously performs image analysis of the camera preview frame and the captured sequence of images to identify occurrence of at least one second event to terminate the capturing of the sequence of images.
